label: 方法基础
description: A paper provides a conceptual or representation foundation for another paper.

label: 能力扩展
description: A later paper expands the modality, task scope, or capability range.

label: 改进版本
description: A paper improves a prior baseline, recipe, or method family.

label: 支撑后续方法
description: A method makes another architecture or workflow practical.

label: 替代路线
description: Two papers address a related goal with different training or optimization choices.

label: PEFT 演化
description: A relation inside the parameter-efficient fine-tuning method line.

label: 对齐流程
description: A relation inside instruction, preference, or safety alignment workflows.

label: 工程支撑
description: A method can support practical training or deployment of another model family.

label: 方法迁移
description: A method pattern from one model family transfers to another domain.

label: 后续延展
description: A plausible future connection for reading, experiments, or business use.

label: 架构对照
description: Two papers solve similar architecture problems with meaningfully different designs.
